## Summary

What does this PR change?

## Type

- [ ] New ReAction
- [ ] Improve existing ReAction
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tooling
- [ ] Examples/tests

## Checklist

- [ ] The ReAction is provider-agnostic.
- [ ] Required capabilities are listed.
- [ ] Pause conditions are clear.
- [ ] Safety rules are included where relevant.
- [ ] Verification rules are included.
- [ ] Final report format is included where relevant.
- [ ] `reactions.json` is updated if a ReAction was added.
- [ ] Pack README is updated if needed.
- [ ] `node scripts/validate-reactions-index.mjs` passes.
